prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-COTTERPIN-PARENT Product Type: HARDWARE_PIN Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Replacement Safety Pin for Trip Wire Perimeter Alarm Signal Device (Pin Only) Description: The ASR Tactical safety pin is proudly made in the USA and is constructed of durable stainless steel that won't rust so you can trust it for use in all weather conditions outdoors. The safety pin is meant to be used with most all types of 209 perimeter alarm devices.

The perimeter alarm is a trip wire activated signaling device that can alert you when trespassers are on your property. This extra safety pin will come in handy if you need a replacement for your current set up. These safety pins are designed to be compatible with the ASR Tactical trip wire perimeter alarm signaling device and will work for other brands as well. Search Terms: 209 perimeter alarm kevlar trip wire spool security reusable home safety burglar systems booby traps catch intruders prevent trespassers trespasser bear signal loud 12 gauge large game door gate device Features: - SAFETY PIN FOR 209 PERIMETER ALARM - Replacement pack of safety pins for use with ASR Tactical perimeter alarm trip wire devices and most other brands of 209 perimeter alarms - MADE IN THE USA - The perimeter alarm safety pin is proudly made in the United States and is constructed of durable stainless steel that won't rust so you can trust it for use in all types of weather - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel; Safety pin diameter: 5/32"; Length: 1.25 inches; Available in assorted pack sizes - Always a good idea to have a few extra safety pins available === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
